steps.name: project-bootstrap
steps.summary: uv 프로젝트(pyproject.toml hatchling, src/ktaxbench/ 패키지) + ARCHITECTURE/PRD 채움 + ADR 0001(vendor-not-import)·0002(claude-cli-first) + .gitignore Python 항목. 검증: uv sync --extra dev OK, import ktaxbench OK, pytest 수집 OK(테스트는 step1에서 추가).

steps.name: schema-validator
steps.summary: src/ktaxbench/schema.py(enum+lint_question, status연동 에러/경고), scripts/validate_questions.py(CLI), tests/test_schema.py(7 pass). id는 하이픈도메인(corp-tax)↔domain필드 언더스코어(corp_tax) 매핑. 검증: 19문항 0 violations(4 warnings=draft 미완성분), pytest green, hash 0 stale.

steps.name: loader-and-models
steps.summary: loader.py(필터 로드), models/base.py(Response+ModelClient 프로토콜), models/claude_cli.py(tax-agent vendor, subprocess claude -p, 실패시 raw_meta.error), models/registry.py(config/models.yaml→provider분기), config/models.yaml(claude opus-4-8/sonnet-4-6/haiku-4-5), tests/test_loader.py(6 pass), scripts/smoke_model.py. 검증: pytest green, load 19, 3 models.

steps.name: prompts-and-rag
steps.summary: prompts.py(build_prompt 3모드, 기준일·사실·required_output·choices 포함), rag/retriever.py(법제처 DRF lawSearch+lawService vendor, accessed_at 주입·outputs/rag_cache 캐시, 장구분 entry 스킵해 실조문 추출), tests/test_prompts.py(4 pass), scripts/smoke_rag.py. 검증: pytest green, RAG 라이브 vat-0003→제61·69조 정확 추출.

steps.name: code-grader
steps.summary: grading/rubric.py(유형별 가중치 합100·DEDUCTIONS·등급컷), grading/code_grader.py(MC 라벨매칭/계산 한국어금액 recall/citation locator매칭, parse_korean_amounts 만·억 파싱, unverified_citation 플래그), tests/test_code_grader.py(6 pass incl test_determinism). 전체 25 tests green.

steps.name: llm-judge-and-aggregate
steps.summary: grading/judge.py(build_judge_prompt·parse_judge_json·self_eval_warning 순수 헬퍼 + judge_answer 모델호출, self-eval 가드), grading/aggregate.py(combine code우선+judge, statement_level_score, pass_caret_k=C(s,k)/C(n,k)), tests/test_aggregate.py(8 pass), scripts/smoke_judge.py. 전체 33 tests green.

steps.name: runner-and-runlog
steps.summary: runner.py(run_one/run_batch, RunRecord 버전핀=model·question_hash·prompt_version·scaffold, client/judge_client 주입가능, 실패시 error기록), runlog.py(write_results/load_results JSONL), scripts/run_eval.py(CLI), tests/test_runner.py(5 pass, stub 주입 결정론). 전체 38 tests green. ★ M2 실행기 v1 완성.

steps.name: multi-provider
steps.blocked_reason: 코드 완료: models/openai_client.py·google_client.py(lazy SDK/키), registry provider 분기, config gpt-5.4·gemini-3-pro, tests/test_registry.py(4 pass). 실호출 검증은 OPENAI_API_KEY/GEMINI_API_KEY 필요.

steps.name: pilot-and-report
steps.blocked_reason: 코드 완료: report.py(aggregate_results·discrimination·error_cases·to_markdown), scripts/make_report.py, tests/fixtures/sample_results.jsonl, tests/test_report.py(5 pass) — fixture 리포트 생성 확인. 파일럿 풀런(3~5모델×~30문항)은 구독 소모 — 수동/사용자 트리거 대기.
